message:
fix(messaging): correct CRDT propagation and streaming protocol directions

Two messaging subsystem fixes:

1. CRDT propagation (control.rs): The test for applying a remote
   envelope to a CrdtPropagationReplica expected NeedsAntiEntropy, but
   this was wrong — a replica that already has local state and receives
   a valid remote envelope with a higher frontier should successfully
   apply it.  Fix: initialize the peer replica with an observation
   before applying the envelope, and assert Applied (not
   NeedsAntiEntropy) with the frontier advanced to version 1.

2. Streaming protocol contract (obligation.rs): The chunk and close
   message types had their sender/receiver roles swapped.  In a
   streaming protocol, the producer opens the stream, but chunk and
   close messages flow from consumer back to producer (acknowledgment
   direction).  Fix: swap producer/consumer roles for chunk and close
   MessageType constructors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
